# AegisFlow 架构设计图

本文档以当前代码和 `asmdef` 为准，描述模块边界、启动流程、业务命令、存档和仿真运行链路。

## 1. 模块分层与依赖

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    bootstrap["Bootstrap：组合根与 Unity 生命周期"]
    procedure["Procedure：流程状态与路由"]
    ui["UI：Form / Presenter / Toast"]
    command["Command：UI 命令分发与绑定"]
    application["Application：用例编排与快照构建"]
    domain["Domain：业务规则与领域服务"]
    runtime["Runtime：事件队列 / 调度 / 恢复"]
    network["Network：请求与数据处理器"]
    save["Save：版本化 JSON / 原子存档 / 备份"]
    resource["Resource：资源加载适配器"]
    legacy["Legacy：旧系统迁移适配器"]
    factory["Factory：实体创建与组件绑定"]
    data["Data：DC / Repository / Snapshot"]
    eventBus["Event：领域事件与状态通知"]

    bootstrap --> procedure
    bootstrap --> ui
    bootstrap --> command
    bootstrap --> application
    bootstrap --> domain
    bootstrap --> runtime
    bootstrap --> network
    bootstrap --> save
    bootstrap --> resource
    bootstrap --> legacy

    procedure --> application
    procedure --> domain
    procedure --> runtime
    procedure --> data
    procedure --> eventBus

    ui --> domain
    ui --> data
    ui --> eventBus
    command --> application
    command --> domain
    command --> data
    command --> eventBus

    application --> domain
    application --> runtime
    application --> save
    application --> data
    domain --> data
    runtime --> data
    runtime --> eventBus
    network --> data
    network --> eventBus
    save --> data
    legacy --> data
    legacy --> save
    factory --> data
```

边界规则：

- `Bootstrap` 是唯一组合根，可以依赖全部业务模块。
- `Procedure` 只能接收 `ProcedureDependencies`，不得反向引用 `Bootstrap/AegisFlowContext`。
- `UI` 只展示 ViewData、发送 Command 或订阅 Event，不直接修改 Repository。
- `Runtime` 只读取 `RuntimeSnapshot`，不直接读取编辑态 Repository。
- `Data` 与 `Event` 是底层叶子程序集，不依赖上层模块。

## 2. 启动与流程状态

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    unity["Unity GameEntry"] -->|"Awake / Start"| appBootstrap["AppBootstrap.Initialize"]
    appBootstrap --> infrastructure["初始化 AssetService 与 SaveAppService"]
    appBootstrap --> context["AegisFlowContext.Build"]
    context --> services["创建 DC、Repository、Domain、Application、Runtime"]
    context --> binders["注册 Network Processor、Event Handler、UI Command"]
    appBootstrap --> dependencies["创建 ProcedureDependencies"]
    dependencies --> launch["ProcedureLaunch"]
    launch --> preload["ProcedurePreload"]
    preload --> hub["ProcedureHub"]
    hub -->|"选择模型"| editor["ProcedureSimulationEditor"]
    editor -->|"保存并运行"| runtimeState["ProcedureSimulationRuntime"]
    editor -->|"返回"| hub
    runtimeState -->|"停止"| hub
```

## 3. 编辑、命令与存档流程

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor User as 用户
    participant View as UI Form
    participant Dispatcher as UICommandDispatcher
    participant Binder as UICommandBinder
    participant Domain as EntityDomainService
    participant App as SimulationModelAppService
    participant Repo as Repository / DC
    participant Save as SaveAppService
    participant Bus as DomainEventBus
    participant Presenter as Presenter / Toast

    User->>View: 创建实体
    View->>Dispatcher: CreateEntityCommand
    Dispatcher->>Binder: 分发命令
    Binder->>Domain: CreateEntity
    Domain->>Repo: 写入实体
    Binder->>Bus: UICommandExecutedEvent
    Bus->>Presenter: 刷新状态与提示

    User->>View: 保存模型
    View->>Dispatcher: SaveModelCommand
    Dispatcher->>Binder: 分发命令
    Binder->>App: SaveCurrentModel
    App->>Repo: 读取模型与实体
    App->>Save: 版本化 JSON 原子保存
    Save-->>App: 主存档与备份结果
    App-->>Binder: 保存结果
    Binder->>Bus: UICommandExecutedEvent
```

## 4. 仿真运行与故障恢复

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    editorRepo["编辑态 EntityRepository"] --> snapshotService["RuntimeSnapshotService"]
    snapshotService --> snapshot["只读 RuntimeSnapshot"]
    snapshot --> runtimeController["SimulationRuntimeController.Load"]
    runtimeController --> queueBuilder["RuntimeEventQueueBuilder"]
    queueBuilder --> eventQueue["SimulationEventQueue"]
    runtimeController --> scheduler["SimulationStepScheduler"]
    scheduler --> eventQueue
    scheduler --> processor["SimulationEventProcessor"]
    processor --> handlers["Create / Activate / Complete Handler"]
    processor --> result["SimulationEventExecutionResult"]
    result --> eventBus["DomainEventBus"]
    eventBus --> runtimePresenter["RuntimePresenter / Status Form"]
    result -->|"PauseRuntime"| paused["暂停并保留失败上下文"]
    paused -->|"Retry"| processor
    paused -->|"Skip"| scheduler
    paused -->|"Terminate"| stopped["清理队列并停止 Runtime"]
```

运行时不变量：

- 固定步长由 `SimulationStepScheduler` 控制，并限制单帧追赶步数。
- Handler 异常必须转为结构化失败，不能逃逸到 Unity 主循环。
- 暂停恢复支持 Retry、Skip、Terminate，且不得重复推进当前 Step。
- Runtime 停止后必须清理 Snapshot、Queue、失败上下文和 `RuntimeDC`。

## 5. 全面测试覆盖地图

| 测试层级 | 覆盖模块 | 关键断言 |
|---|---|---|
| 架构规则 | asmdef、Bootstrap、Procedure、UI | 无循环依赖；Procedure 不引用 Bootstrap；UI 不写 Repository |
| 单元测试 | Data、Domain、Event、Save、Runtime、UI | 边界值、重复数据、事件解绑、JSON 版本、调度重入、Toast 生命周期 |
| 应用测试 | Application、Command、Network、Legacy、Factory | 用例编排、命令结果、协议注册、迁移幂等、实体恢复 |
| 集成测试 | Bootstrap、Procedure、Save、Runtime | 启动到 Hub；创建到保存再加载；快照到运行；失败恢复 |
| PlayMode 冒烟 | GameEntry、UI Form、Unity 生命周期 | 场景启动、点击命令、状态刷新、退出清理均无异常 |

推荐的最小端到端验收链：

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    start["启动 GameEntry"] --> hub["进入 Hub"]
    hub --> login["注入登录与玩家数据"]
    login --> editor["进入 Editor"]
    editor --> create["创建实体"]
    create --> save["保存模型"]
    save --> reload["清空并重新加载"]
    reload --> run["生成快照并启动 Runtime"]
    run --> steps["执行 Creating / Active / Complete"]
    steps --> verify["验证事件、状态和 Presenter"]
    verify --> stop["停止并校验资源清理"]
```

# AegisFlowCode 玄盾流架构代码骨架

> 这是一套可迁入 Unity 项目的玄盾流架构 C# 代码骨架。  
> 目标不是替换旧项目，而是为新功能建立清晰边界。

---

## 1. 代码骨架范围

```text
AegisFlowCode
├── Bootstrap       启动入口
├── Procedure       流程岗位
├── Application     用例编排
├── Domain          领域防腐
├── Data            DC / Repository 数据容器
├── Event           强类型领域事件
├── Command         UI / 领域命令
├── Network         协议处理器注册表
├── Factory         实体创建、分组、组件绑定
├── UI              UIForm / Presenter 基类
├── Runtime         运行态 Snapshot / Scheduler
├── Resource        资源统一入口
├── Save            保存统一入口
└── Legacy          旧系统防腐适配器
```

---

## 2. 推荐接入顺序

### 第一步：接入 Bootstrap

将以下文件迁入 Unity：

```text
Bootstrap/GameEntry.cs
Bootstrap/AppBootstrap.cs
Procedure/ProcedureBase.cs
Procedure/ProcedureController.cs
Procedure/ProcedureLaunch.cs
Procedure/ProcedurePreload.cs
Procedure/ProcedureHub.cs
```

在启动场景中创建一个 GameObject，挂载 `AegisFlow.Bootstrap.GameEntry`。

---

### 第二步：接入资源入口

迁入：

```text
Resource/IAssetLoader.cs
Resource/AssetService.cs
Resource/ResourcesLegacyAdapter.cs
```

旧项目仍可先走 `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`，后续再替换为 UGF Resource / Addressables Adapter。

---

### 第三步：接入数据与领域层

迁入：

```text
Data/EntityData.cs
Data/EntityRepository.cs
Data/ModelRepository.cs
Domain/EntityDomainService.cs
Domain/ModelDomainService.cs
Application/RuntimeSnapshotService.cs
```

注意：

```text
Repository 只做数据容器。
业务规则写在 DomainService。
UI 不允许直接写 Repository。
```

---

### 第四步：接入 UI 基类

迁入：

```text
UI/UIFormBase.cs
UI/PresenterBase.cs
```

新 UI 必须遵守：

```text
UI 只展示 ViewData。
UI 只发 Command。
UI 不直接写 DC / Repository / PlayerState。
```

---

### 第五步：接入运行态快照

迁入：

```text
Data/RuntimeSnapshot.cs
Runtime/SimulationRuntimeController.cs
Runtime/SimulationStepScheduler.cs
Application/SimulationAppService.cs
```

运行态必须遵守：

```text
运行态不直接读编辑态 Repository。
运行态使用 RuntimeSnapshot。
StepScheduler 禁止 async void 重入。
```

---

### 第六步：接入保存系统

迁入：

```text
Save/ISaveRepository.cs
Save/SaveAppService.cs
Save/LocalSaveRepository.cs
```

真实项目中建议替换为已有高质量实现：

```text
DataSaver.SaveDataToJsonSafe
```

---

### 第七步：接入旧系统防腐层

迁入：

```text
Legacy/LegacyGameAdapter.cs
```

后续按需扩展：

```text
LegacyPlayerStateAdapter
LegacyMrCSaveAdapter
LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter
LegacyResourceAdapter
```

---

## 3. 当前骨架重点解决的问题

| 问题 | 对应代码 |
|---|---|
| GameEntry MonoBehaviour new 风险 | Bootstrap/GameEntry.cs |
| Procedure 职责膨胀 | Procedure/ProcedureBase.cs |
| EntityRepository 上帝对象 | Domain/EntityDomainService.cs + Data/EntityRepository.cs |
| UI 直写业务数据 | UI/UIFormBase.cs + UI/PresenterBase.cs |
| 资源入口分散 | Resource/AssetService.cs |
| 运行态污染编辑态 | Data/RuntimeSnapshot.cs |
| async void 重入 | Runtime/SimulationStepScheduler.cs |
| 保存入口分散 | Save/SaveAppService.cs |
| 旧系统强耦合 | Legacy/LegacyGameAdapter.cs |

---

```text
Procedure 是岗位，不是功能堆砌场。
DC 是单一事实来源，UI 只读不写。
Event 解耦，不是 Event 滥用。
能用防腐隔离解决的，不推倒重来。
能用组合解决的，不用继承强拆。
```

## Overview

AegisFlowCode (玄盾流 / "Xuan-Wu") is a layered Unity C# architecture skeleton at `E:\Unity\unity-Project\xuan-wu\Assets\AegisFlowCode`. It is organized into 15 asmdef-bounded modules. The design enforces strict layering: `Data` and `Event` are leaf assemblies (no engine refs, no upstream deps); `Bootstrap` is the only composition root allowed to reference everything. The codebase is a simulation/digital-twin platform — it edits "models" (collections of entities), snapshots them into an immutable runtime, then drives a fixed-step event queue with structured failure/recovery (Retry/Skip/Terminate).

I read the full `ARCHITECTURE.md` and `README.md` (which enumerate every file added across 19 batches), all 15 `.asmdef` files, and directly read source from Bootstrap, Application, Domain, Data, Runtime, Event, Command, and Save. (A few files returned a caching "unchanged" glitch, but their behavior is fully described in the architecture docs and inferred from their callers.)

## Module Dependency Graph (from .asmdef references)

```
Data        → (none)                          [leaf, noEngineReferences]
Event       → (none)                          [leaf]
Domain      → Data
Runtime     → Data, Event
Save        → Data
Factory     → Data
Network     → Data, Event
Application → Data, Domain, Runtime, Save
Command     → Application, Domain, Data, Event
UI          → Domain, Data, Event
Procedure   → Application, Data, Domain, Event, Runtime
Legacy      → Data, Save
Resource    → (none, plain Unity/UGF)
Bootstrap   → ALL of the above + UnityGameFramework.Runtime
Tests       → (architecture rules + behavior tests)
```
Key rule: `Procedure` may NOT reference `Bootstrap` (enforced via `ProcedureDependencies` injection). `UI` may NOT write repositories/DCs. `Runtime` reads only `RuntimeSnapshot`, never edit-state repositories.

## Folder-by-Folder Summary

### Bootstrap/ (composition root + Unity lifecycle)
- **`GameEntry.cs`** — `sealed MonoBehaviour`, singleton with `DontDestroyOnLoad`. `Awake` sets instance; `Start` creates `AppBootstrap`; forwards `Update`/`OnDestroy`. Pure Unity entry, no business logic.
- **`AppBootstrap.cs`** — `Initialize()`: inits `AssetService` (picks `UGFResourceAdapter` if ResourceComponent present, else `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`), inits `SaveAppService` with `LocalSaveRepository`, builds `AegisFlowContext`, creates `ProcedureDependencies`, and launches `ProcedureLaunch` via `ProcedureController.ChangeProcedure`. Has `Update(elapse, realElapse)` (drives procedure tick) and `Shutdown()` (disposes context + Save/Asset services).
- **`AegisFlowContext.cs`** — the pure composition root. Holds public getters for ALL services. `Build()` instantiates and wires: 4 DCs, 2 repositories, `DomainEventBus`, 4 DomainServices, `RuntimeSnapshotService`, strategy config + `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder` (registers `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy`), Network (`DataProcessorRegistry` + `Login/PlayerDataProcessor` + `NetworkClient` + `LoginReqService`), Runtime (`SimulationEventProcessor` with Create/Activate/Complete handlers, `SimulationEventQueue`, `SimulationRuntimeController`), `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService` (with `UnitySaveJsonAdapter`), UI command (`UICommandDispatcher`+`UICommandBinder.Bind()`), Toast (`ToastPresenter`/`ToastPolicy`/`ToastQueue`/`UIFormLifecycleBinder`), 2 Presenters, and 5 Legacy adapters. `Dispose()` unbinds/clears everything.

### Procedure/ (workflow state machine)
- **`ProcedureBase.cs`** — abstract base for procedure states (constructor takes controller + dependencies).
- **`ProcedureController.cs`** — manages current procedure; `ChangeProcedure(...)`, `Update(...)`, `Shutdown()`.
- **`ProcedureDependencies.cs`** — value object injected into procedures (carries `SimulationDC`, `PlayerDomainService`, `ModelDomainService`, `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService`, `SimulationRuntimeController`, `DomainEventBus`). This replaces a reverse-dependency on AegisFlowContext.
- **`ProcedureRouteService.cs`** — routing with guards: empty modelId guard, `HasPlayer` permission guard, `SimulationDC.IsDirty` dirty-data guard; fires `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent` on failure.
- **`ProcedureLaunch` → `ProcedurePreload` → `ProcedureHub` → `ProcedureSimulationEditor` → `ProcedureSimulationRuntime`** — the flow. Editor supports `SaveCurrentModel`/load via `SimulationModelAppService`, `BackToHub`/`EnterRuntime` via `ProcedureRouteService`. Runtime stops the runtime on exit.

### Application/ (use-case orchestration)
- **`SimulationAppService`** — `StartRuntime(modelId)` (checks `ModelDomainService.CanRun`, builds snapshot via `RuntimeSnapshotService`, loads into `SimulationRuntimeController`); `RetryFailedEvent()`/`SkipFailedEvent()`/`TerminateFailedRuntime()` for recovery.
- **`SimulationModelAppService`** — edit-state save/load. `SaveCurrentModel()` writes `SimulationModelSaveData(modelId, false, EntityRepository.GetAll())` via `SaveAppService.Save` (key `simulation_{modelId}`), marks `SimulationDC.MarkSaved`, registers in `ModelRepository`. `LoadModel(modelId)` tries main save then backup, validates modelId match, clears + repopulates `EntityRepository`, `SimulationDC.SwitchModel`.
- **`RuntimeSnapshotService`** — `BuildSnapshot(modelId)`: deep-clones each `EntityData` from `EntityRepository` into a `RuntimeSnapshot` (immutable runtime view).

### Domain/ (business rules, anti-corruption)
- **`EntityDomainService`** — `CreateEntity(EntityData)` (null/id/duplicate guards → `EntityRepository.Add`), `RemoveEntity(entityId)`.
- **`ModelDomainService`** — `CanRun(modelId)` (existence check), `Register(modelId)`.
- **`PlayerDomainService`** — `HasPlayer()`, `CanEnterBattle()` (has player + Level>0).
- **`BattlePrepareDomainService`** — `TryBuildBattleInput(out BattleInput)` (gate on CanEnterBattle).
- **`BattleInput.cs`** — battle input DTO.

### Data/ (single source of truth — DCs, repositories, snapshot)
- **`DataCenterBase`** (abstract) — DC base with `AddChangedListener`/`RemoveChangedListener`/protected `Save()` (observer notification). DCs = single source of truth, UI reads only.
- **`AccountDC`** — `AccountId`, `Token`, `IsLoggedIn`, `AttachLoginResult(...)`, `Clear()`.
- **`PlayerDC`** — `PlayerId`, `DisplayName`, `Level`, `AttachPlayerInfo(...)`.
- **`SimulationDC`** — `CurrentModelId`, `IsDirty`, `SwitchModel/MarkDirty/MarkSaved`.
- **`RuntimeDC`** — runtime state (modelId/step/status); `StartRuntime`/`Stop` (referenced by controller).
- **`EntityRepository`** — pure container, no rules: `Exists/Add/Remove/Get/GetAll/Clear` over `Dictionary<string,EntityData>`.
- **`ModelRepository`** — `HashSet<string>` of model IDs: `Exists/Add/Remove`.
- **`EntityData`** — core entity model with `EntityId`, `ConfigId`, and `Clone()` (deep-clone for snapshot isolation). **This is the central data unit for a digital twin.**
- **`RuntimeSnapshot`** — immutable `ModelId` + `IReadOnlyList<EntityData>`; `AddEntity`.

### Runtime/ (event queue, scheduling, recovery)
- **`SimulationRuntimeController`** — `Load(snapshot)` (resets scheduler, builds queue via `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.Build`, `RuntimeDC.StartRuntime`), `Tick(deltaTime)` → scheduler, `RetryFailedEvent/SkipFailedEvent/TerminateFailedRuntime/Stop`. `HasPendingFailure` exposes scheduler state.
- **`SimulationStepScheduler`** — fixed-step, single-frame catch-up cap, no `async void` reentry; on failure pauses and preserves failed event + remaining-events context; fires `RuntimeStepChangedEvent`.
- **`SimulationEventProcessor`** — registry of `ISimulationEventHandler` by `EventType`; `ExecuteEvent` applies `SimulationEventExecutionPolicy` (max retries), catches handler exceptions into structured `SimulationEventExecutionResult` (status, attemptCount, durationMs via Stopwatch, errorMessage).
- **`SimulationEventQueue`** — time_step ordered event queue.
- **`SimulationEvent`** — `EventType`, `TimeStep`, `EntityId`.
- **`ISimulationEventHandler`** — `{ string EventType; bool Execute(SimulationEvent); }`.
- **Handlers**: `CreateEntityEventHandler`("Creating"), `ActivateEntityEventHandler`("Activating"), `CompleteEntityEventHandler`("Completed") — each returns bool.
- **`IRuntimeEventStrategy`** — `CanHandle(EntityData)`, `Build(EntityData, baseStep, queue)`. Implementations: `DefaultRuntimeEventStrategy` (Creating/Activating/Completed), `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy` (table-driven by `ConfigId` via `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig`), `AgvRuntimeEventStrategy` (AGV-specific).
- **`RuntimeEventQueueBuilder`** — registers strategies; `Build(snapshot, queue)` iterates entities, picks matching strategy (falls back to default), enqueues events at increasing base steps.
- **`RuntimeEventStrategyConfig`/`...ConfigLoader`** — `LoadDefault()`/`LoadFromText()` mapping ConfigId → event type sequences.

### Event/ (typed domain events)
- **`DomainEvent`** (abstract, `CreatedTime`).
- **`DomainEventBus`** — type-keyed `Subscribe<TEvent>/Unsubscribe<TEvent>/Fire<TEvent>/Clear` (delegate combine/remove; dedupes).
- Concrete events: `LoginSucceededEvent`, `PlayerInfoUpdatedEvent`, `RuntimeStepChangedEvent`, `SimulationEventExecutedEvent`, `SimulationRecoveryEvent` (+ `SimulationRecoveryAction` enum), `UICommandExecutedEvent`, `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent`, and `SimulationEventExecutionStatus` enum.

### Command/ (UI command dispatch)
- **`UICommand`** (abstract, `CommandId`).
- **`UICommandDispatcher`** — `Register/Unregister/Dispatch<TCommand>` (delegate-based).
- **`UICommandBinder`** — `Bind()` wires 6 commands → services: `CreateEntityCommand`→`EntityDomainService.CreateEntity`; `SaveModelCommand`/`LoadModelCommand`→`SimulationModelAppService`; `Retry/Skip/Terminate`→`SimulationAppService`. Each fires `UICommandExecutedEvent` with success+message. `Unbind()` reverses.
- Concrete commands: `CreateEntityCommand`, `LoadModelCommand`, `SaveModelCommand`, `RetrySimulationEventCommand`, `SkipSimulationEventCommand`, `TerminateSimulationRuntimeCommand`.

### UI/ (forms, presenters, toast)
- **`UIFormBase`** — base form (lifecycle). **`PresenterBase`** — base presenter.
- **`PlayerPresenter`** (PlayerDC + PlayerDomainService), **`RuntimePresenter`** (RuntimeDC) — bind DC → ViewData.
- **`PlayerViewData`/`RuntimeViewData`/`ToastViewData`** — immutable view DTOs (UI shows only ViewData).
- **`PlayerInfoForm`/`RuntimeStatusForm`** — concrete forms; `CommandToastForm` subscribes to `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent`/`UICommandExecutedEvent`.
- **`UIFormLifecycleBinder`** — wires `DomainEventBus` subscriptions + `ToastPresenter`/`ToastQueue`/`ToastPolicy` into forms.
- **Toast subsystem**: `ToastPresenter`, `ToastPolicy`(2.5s duration, auto-hide), `ToastQueue`, `ToastAnimationState`/`ToastAnimationStateMachine`.

### Save/ (versioned JSON, atomic, backup)
- **`ISaveJsonAdapter`** — `ToJson(SimulationModelSaveData)`/`TryFromJson` (swap Newtonsoft/System.Text.Json/JsonUtility).
- **`UnitySaveJsonAdapter`** / **`LightweightSaveJsonAdapter`** — implementations.
- **`SaveAppService`** — static facade: `Initialize(repo)`, `Save/TryLoad/TryLoadBackup/Shutdown`.
- **`ISaveRepository`/`LocalSaveRepository`** — persistence with `TryLoad` + backup.
- **`SimulationModelSaveData`** — structured save (modelId + Entity list), `TryParse`/escape via `SaveJsonUtility`.

### Resource/ (asset loading abstraction)
- **`IAssetLoader`** / **`AssetService`** (static Initialize/Shutdown) — unified entry.
- Adapters: `UGFResourceAdapter`, `AddressablesAdapter`, `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`.

### Factory/ (entity creation/grouping/binding)
- **`EntityFactory`**, **`EntityGroupResolver`**, **`EntityComponentBinder`**, **`EntityRestoreService`** — entity instantiation, group resolution, component binding, restore from save. (Factory → Data only.)

### Legacy/ (anti-corruption layer for old system)
- **`LegacyGameAdapter`**, **`LegacyPlayerStateAdapter`**, **`LegacyMrCSaveAdapter`**, **`LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter`**, **`LegacySaveMigrationService`** (idempotent migration via `LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter`). Isolates old code rather than rewriting.

### Network/ (protocol processors)
- **`IDataProcessor`** / **`DataProcessorRegistry`** (`Register`/`Clear`).
- **`NetworkClient`** (dispatches to registry), **`ReqServiceBase`** + **`LoginReqService`**.
- **`LoginDataProcessor`** (writes `AccountDC`, fires `LoginSucceededEvent`), **`PlayerDataProcessor`** (writes `PlayerDC`, fires `PlayerInfoUpdatedEvent`).

## Data Flow

1. **Startup**: `GameEntry` → `AppBootstrap.Initialize` → init Asset/Save → `AegisFlowContext.Build()` (wires everything) → `ProcedureController.ChangeProcedure(ProcedureLaunch)` → Preload → Hub → Editor → Runtime.
2. **Edit/Command flow**: UI Form → `UICommandDispatcher.Dispatch` → `UICommandBinder` → Domain/AppService → Repository/DC → `UICommandExecutedEvent` on `DomainEventBus` → Presenters/Toast refresh.
3. **Save flow**: `SaveModelCommand` → `SimulationModelAppService.SaveCurrentModel` → `EntityRepository.GetAll()` → `SimulationModelSaveData` → `ISaveJsonAdapter.ToJson` → `SaveAppService.Save` (atomic + backup) → `ModelRepository.Add` + `SimulationDC.MarkSaved`.
4. **Runtime flow**: `SimulationAppService.StartRuntime` → `RuntimeSnapshotService.BuildSnapshot` (clones entities) → `SimulationRuntimeController.Load` → `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.Build` (per-entity strategy → events) → `SimulationStepScheduler.Tick` (fixed step) → `SimulationEventProcessor.ExecuteEvent` (retry policy, structured result) → `SimulationEventExecutedEvent` + `RuntimeStepChangedEvent` → `RuntimePresenter`/Status Form. Runtime reads ONLY the snapshot.
5. **Failure recovery**: failed event pauses scheduler (preserves context) → user `Retry`/`Skip`/`Terminate` commands → `SimulationAppService` → controller/scheduler → `SimulationRecoveryEvent` audit.

## Extension Points for a Digital Twin Application

- **`EntityData`** (Data) — extend with twin-specific fields (position, sensor data, state). Add new ConfigIds.
- **`IRuntimeEventStrategy`** (Runtime) — implement per-asset-type event sequences (e.g., AGV path, sensor telemetry). Register in `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder`. `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy` + `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig` allows data-driven (JSON) event sequences by ConfigId.
- **`ISimulationEventHandler`** (Runtime) — implement new `EventType` handlers (e.g., "Moving", "Sensing") and `Register` on `SimulationEventProcessor`. Each returns bool success.
- **`SimulationEventExecutionPolicy`** — tune max retries + failure action (`PauseRuntime`).
- **`UICommand`/`UICommandBinder`** (Command) — add commands, bind to new AppServices.
- **`ISaveJsonAdapter`** (Save) — swap JSON engine; extend `SimulationModelSaveData` for twin persistence.
- **`IAssetLoader`/`AssetService`** (Resource) — plug UGF/Addressables/Resources loaders.
- **`IDataProcessor`** (Network) — add protocol processors writing DCs + firing events.
- **`DataCenterBase`** (Data) — add DCs for twin telemetry as single sources of truth.
- **`PresenterBase`/`UIFormBase`** (UI) — add presenters/forms bound to new ViewData.
- **`AegisFlowContext.Build()`** — the single wiring point to register all new services.
- **Legacy adapters** — migrate existing twin code incrementally without rewriting.

## Compile Boundaries (noEngineReferences note)
`Data`, `Event`, `Domain`, `Save`, `Application` have `noEngineReferences: true` (pure C#, testable without Unity). `Runtime`, `Factory`, `Procedure`, `UI`, `Resource`, `Legacy`, `Network`, `Bootstrap` reference UnityEngine (Bootstrap also needs `UnityGameFramework.Runtime`). This lets core logic run in EditMode/unit tests.
args.next_steps: To build a digital twin: (1) extend `EntityData` with twin fields + new ConfigIds; (2) implement `IRuntimeEventStrategy` for each asset type and register via `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig` (JSON-driven) or code in `AegisFlowContext.Build`; (3) add `ISimulationEventHandler`s for new event types and register on `SimulationEventProcessor`; (4) add `UICommand`s + bind in `UICommandBinder` for twin operations; (5) optionally add a `TwinDC : DataCenterBase` for live telemetry. All wiring happens in `AegisFlowContext.Build()` / `ProcedureDependencies`. The remaining unread files (due to a read-cache glitch: `EntityData.cs`, `RuntimeDC.cs`, `SimulationStepScheduler.cs`, `SimulationEventQueue.cs`, `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.cs`, `UIFormBase.cs`, `PresenterBase.cs`, `EntityFactory.cs`) are fully described in `ARCHITECTURE.md` and inferred from their callers above — re-read them directly if exact line-level APIs are needed before implementation.

### Bootstrap/ (composition root + Unity lifecycle)
- **`GameEntry.cs`** — `sealed MonoBehaviour`, singleton with `DontDestroyOnLoad`. `Awake` sets instance; `Start` creates `AppBootstrap`; forwards `Update`/`OnDestroy`. Pure Unity entry, no business logic.
- **`AppBootstrap.cs`** — `Initialize()`: inits `AssetService` (picks `UGFResourceAdapter` if ResourceComponent present, else `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`), inits `SaveAppService` with `LocalSaveRepository`, builds `AegisFlowContext`, creates `ProcedureDependencies`, and launches `ProcedureLaunch` via `ProcedureController.ChangeProcedure`. Has `Update(elapse, realElapse)` (drives procedure tick) and `Shutdown()` (disposes context + Save/Asset services).
- **`AegisFlowContext.cs`** — the pure composition root. Holds public getters for ALL services. `Build()` instantiates and wires: 4 DCs, 2 repositories, `DomainEventBus`, 4 DomainServices, `RuntimeSnapshotService`, strategy config + `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder` (registers `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy`), Network (`DataProcessorRegistry` + `Login/PlayerDataProcessor` + `NetworkClient` + `LoginReqService`), Runtime (`SimulationEventProcessor` with Create/Activate/Complete handlers, `SimulationEventQueue`, `SimulationRuntimeController`), `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService` (with `UnitySaveJsonAdapter`), UI command (`UICommandDispatcher`+`UICommandBinder.Bind()`), Toast (`ToastPresenter`/`ToastPolicy`/`ToastQueue`/`UIFormLifecycleBinder`), 2 Presenters, and 5 Legacy adapters. `Dispose()` unbinds/clears everything.

### Procedure/ (workflow state machine)
- **`ProcedureBase.cs`** — abstract base for procedure states (constructor takes controller + dependencies).
- **`ProcedureController.cs`** — manages current procedure; `ChangeProcedure(...)`, `Update(...)`, `Shutdown()`.
- **`ProcedureDependencies.cs`** — value object injected into procedures (carries `SimulationDC`, `PlayerDomainService`, `ModelDomainService`, `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService`, `SimulationRuntimeController`, `DomainEventBus`). This replaces a reverse-dependency on AegisFlowContext.
- **`ProcedureRouteService.cs`** — routing with guards: empty modelId guard, `HasPlayer` permission guard, `SimulationDC.IsDirty` dirty-data guard; fires `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent` on failure.
- **`ProcedureLaunch` → `ProcedurePreload` → `ProcedureHub` → `ProcedureSimulationEditor` → `ProcedureSimulationRuntime`** — the flow. Editor supports `SaveCurrentModel`/load via `SimulationModelAppService`, `BackToHub`/`EnterRuntime` via `ProcedureRouteService`. Runtime stops the runtime on exit.

### Application/ (use-case orchestration)
- **`SimulationAppService`** — `StartRuntime(modelId)` (checks `ModelDomainService.CanRun`, builds snapshot via `RuntimeSnapshotService`, loads into `SimulationRuntimeController`); `RetryFailedEvent()`/`SkipFailedEvent()`/`TerminateFailedRuntime()` for recovery.
- **`SimulationModelAppService`** — edit-state save/load. `SaveCurrentModel()` writes `SimulationModelSaveData(modelId, false, EntityRepository.GetAll())` via `SaveAppService.Save` (key `simulation_{modelId}`), marks `SimulationDC.MarkSaved`, registers in `ModelRepository`. `LoadModel(modelId)` tries main save then backup, validates modelId match, clears + repopulates `EntityRepository`, `SimulationDC.SwitchModel`.
- **`RuntimeSnapshotService`** — `BuildSnapshot(modelId)`: deep-clones each `EntityData` from `EntityRepository` into a `RuntimeSnapshot` (immutable runtime view).

### Domain/ (business rules, anti-corruption)
- **`EntityDomainService`** — `CreateEntity(EntityData)` (null/id/duplicate guards → `EntityRepository.Add`), `RemoveEntity(entityId)`.
- **`ModelDomainService`** — `CanRun(modelId)` (existence check), `Register(modelId)`.
- **`PlayerDomainService`** — `HasPlayer()`, `CanEnterBattle()` (has player + Level>0).
- **`BattlePrepareDomainService`** — `TryBuildBattleInput(out BattleInput)` (gate on CanEnterBattle).
- **`BattleInput.cs`** — battle input DTO.

### Data/ (single source of truth — DCs, repositories, snapshot)
- **`DataCenterBase`** (abstract) — DC base with `AddChangedListener`/`RemoveChangedListener`/protected `Save()` (observer notification). DCs = single source of truth, UI reads only.
- **`AccountDC`** — `AccountId`, `Token`, `IsLoggedIn`, `AttachLoginResult(...)`, `Clear()`.
- **`PlayerDC`** — `PlayerId`, `DisplayName`, `Level`, `AttachPlayerInfo(...)`.
- **`SimulationDC`** — `CurrentModelId`, `IsDirty`, `SwitchModel/MarkDirty/MarkSaved`.
- **`RuntimeDC`** — runtime state (modelId/step/status); `StartRuntime`/`Stop` (referenced by controller).
- **`EntityRepository`** — pure container, no rules: `Exists/Add/Remove/Get/GetAll/Clear` over `Dictionary<string,EntityData>`.
- **`ModelRepository`** — `HashSet<string>` of model IDs: `Exists/Add/Remove`.
- **`EntityData`** — core entity model with `EntityId`, `ConfigId`, and `Clone()` (deep-clone for snapshot isolation). **This is the central data unit for a digital twin.**
- **`RuntimeSnapshot`** — immutable `ModelId` + `IReadOnlyList<EntityData>`; `AddEntity`.

### Runtime/ (event queue, scheduling, recovery)
- **`SimulationRuntimeController`** — `Load(snapshot)` (resets scheduler, builds queue via `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.Build`, `RuntimeDC.StartRuntime`), `Tick(deltaTime)` → scheduler, `RetryFailedEvent/SkipFailedEvent/TerminateFailedRuntime/Stop`. `HasPendingFailure` exposes scheduler state.
- **`SimulationStepScheduler`** — fixed-step, single-frame catch-up cap, no `async void` reentry; on failure pauses and preserves failed event + remaining-events context; fires `RuntimeStepChangedEvent`.
- **`SimulationEventProcessor`** — registry of `ISimulationEventHandler` by `EventType`; `ExecuteEvent` applies `SimulationEventExecutionPolicy` (max retries), catches handler exceptions into structured `SimulationEventExecutionResult` (status, attemptCount, durationMs via Stopwatch, errorMessage).
- **`SimulationEventQueue`** — time_step ordered event queue.
- **`SimulationEvent`** — `EventType`, `TimeStep`, `EntityId`.
- **`ISimulationEventHandler`** — `{ string EventType; bool Execute(SimulationEvent); }`.
- **Handlers**: `CreateEntityEventHandler`("Creating"), `ActivateEntityEventHandler`("Activating"), `CompleteEntityEventHandler`("Completed") — each returns bool.
- **`IRuntimeEventStrategy`** — `CanHandle(EntityData)`, `Build(EntityData, baseStep, queue)`. Implementations: `DefaultRuntimeEventStrategy` (Creating/Activating/Completed), `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy` (table-driven by `ConfigId` via `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig`), `AgvRuntimeEventStrategy` (AGV-specific).
- **`RuntimeEventQueueBuilder`** — registers strategies; `Build(snapshot, queue)` iterates entities, picks matching strategy (falls back to default), enqueues events at increasing base steps.
- **`RuntimeEventStrategyConfig`/`...ConfigLoader`** — `LoadDefault()`/`LoadFromText()` mapping ConfigId → event type sequences.

### Event/ (typed domain events)
- **`DomainEvent`** (abstract, `CreatedTime`).
- **`DomainEventBus`** — type-keyed `Subscribe<TEvent>/Unsubscribe<TEvent>/Fire<TEvent>/Clear` (delegate combine/remove; dedupes).
- Concrete events: `LoginSucceededEvent`, `PlayerInfoUpdatedEvent`, `RuntimeStepChangedEvent`, `SimulationEventExecutedEvent`, `SimulationRecoveryEvent` (+ `SimulationRecoveryAction` enum), `UICommandExecutedEvent`, `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent`, and `SimulationEventExecutionStatus` enum.

### Command/ (UI command dispatch)
- **`UICommand`** (abstract, `CommandId`).
- **`UICommandDispatcher`** — `Register/Unregister/Dispatch<TCommand>` (delegate-based).
- **`UICommandBinder`** — `Bind()` wires 6 commands → services: `CreateEntityCommand`→`EntityDomainService.CreateEntity`; `SaveModelCommand`/`LoadModelCommand`→`SimulationModelAppService`; `Retry/Skip/Terminate`→`SimulationAppService`. Each fires `UICommandExecutedEvent` with success+message. `Unbind()` reverses.
- Concrete commands: `CreateEntityCommand`, `LoadModelCommand`, `SaveModelCommand`, `RetrySimulationEventCommand`, `SkipSimulationEventCommand`, `TerminateSimulationRuntimeCommand`.

### UI/ (forms, presenters, toast)
- **`UIFormBase`** — base form (lifecycle). **`PresenterBase`** — base presenter.
- **`PlayerPresenter`** (PlayerDC + PlayerDomainService), **`RuntimePresenter`** (RuntimeDC) — bind DC → ViewData.
- **`PlayerViewData`/`RuntimeViewData`/`ToastViewData`** — immutable view DTOs (UI shows only ViewData).
- **`PlayerInfoForm`/`RuntimeStatusForm`** — concrete forms; `CommandToastForm` subscribes to `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent`/`UICommandExecutedEvent`.
- **`UIFormLifecycleBinder`** — wires `DomainEventBus` subscriptions + `ToastPresenter`/`ToastQueue`/`ToastPolicy` into forms.
- **Toast subsystem**: `ToastPresenter`, `ToastPolicy`(2.5s duration, auto-hide), `ToastQueue`, `ToastAnimationState`/`ToastAnimationStateMachine`.

### Save/ (versioned JSON, atomic, backup)
- **`ISaveJsonAdapter`** — `ToJson(SimulationModelSaveData)`/`TryFromJson` (swap Newtonsoft/System.Text.Json/JsonUtility).
- **`UnitySaveJsonAdapter`** / **`LightweightSaveJsonAdapter`** — implementations.
- **`SaveAppService`** — static facade: `Initialize(repo)`, `Save/TryLoad/TryLoadBackup/Shutdown`.
- **`ISaveRepository`/`LocalSaveRepository`** — persistence with `TryLoad` + backup.
- **`SimulationModelSaveData`** — structured save (modelId + Entity list), `TryParse`/escape via `SaveJsonUtility`.

### Resource/ (asset loading abstraction)
- **`IAssetLoader`** / **`AssetService`** (static Initialize/Shutdown) — unified entry.
- Adapters: `UGFResourceAdapter`, `AddressablesAdapter`, `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`.

### Factory/ (entity creation/grouping/binding)
- **`EntityFactory`**, **`EntityGroupResolver`**, **`EntityComponentBinder`**, **`EntityRestoreService`** — entity instantiation, group resolution, component binding, restore from save. (Factory → Data only.)

### Legacy/ (anti-corruption layer for old system)
- **`LegacyGameAdapter`**, **`LegacyPlayerStateAdapter`**, **`LegacyMrCSaveAdapter`**, **`LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter`**, **`LegacySaveMigrationService`** (idempotent migration via `LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter`). Isolates old code rather than rewriting.

### Network/ (protocol processors)
- **`IDataProcessor`** / **`DataProcessorRegistry`** (`Register`/`Clear`).
- **`NetworkClient`** (dispatches to registry), **`ReqServiceBase`** + **`LoginReqService`**.
- **`LoginDataProcessor`** (writes `AccountDC`, fires `LoginSucceededEvent`), **`PlayerDataProcessor`** (writes `PlayerDC`, fires `PlayerInfoUpdatedEvent`).

## Data Flow

1. **Startup**: `GameEntry` → `AppBootstrap.Initialize` → init Asset/Save → `AegisFlowContext.Build()` (wires everything) → `ProcedureController.ChangeProcedure(ProcedureLaunch)` → Preload → Hub → Editor → Runtime.
2. **Edit/Command flow**: UI Form → `UICommandDispatcher.Dispatch` → `UICommandBinder` → Domain/AppService → Repository/DC → `UICommandExecutedEvent` on `DomainEventBus` → Presenters/Toast refresh.
3. **Save flow**: `SaveModelCommand` → `SimulationModelAppService.SaveCurrentModel` → `EntityRepository.GetAll()` → `SimulationModelSaveData` → `ISaveJsonAdapter.ToJson` → `SaveAppService.Save` (atomic + backup) → `ModelRepository.Add` + `SimulationDC.MarkSaved`.
4. **Runtime flow**: `SimulationAppService.StartRuntime` → `RuntimeSnapshotService.BuildSnapshot` (clones entities) → `SimulationRuntimeController.Load` → `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.Build` (per-entity strategy → events) → `SimulationStepScheduler.Tick` (fixed step) → `SimulationEventProcessor.ExecuteEvent` (retry policy, structured result) → `SimulationEventExecutedEvent` + `RuntimeStepChangedEvent` → `RuntimePresenter`/Status Form. Runtime reads ONLY the snapshot.
5. **Failure recovery**: failed event pauses scheduler (preserves context) → user `Retry`/`Skip`/`Terminate` commands → `SimulationAppService` → controller/scheduler → `SimulationRecoveryEvent` audit.

## Extension Points for a Digital Twin Application

- **`EntityData`** (Data) — extend with twin-specific fields (position, sensor data, state). Add new ConfigIds.
- **`IRuntimeEventStrategy`** (Runtime) — implement per-asset-type event sequences (e.g., AGV path, sensor telemetry). Register in `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder`. `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy` + `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig` allows data-driven (JSON) event sequences by ConfigId.
- **`ISimulationEventHandler`** (Runtime) — implement new `EventType` handlers (e.g., "Moving", "Sensing") and `Register` on `SimulationEventProcessor`. Each returns bool success.
- **`SimulationEventExecutionPolicy`** — tune max retries + failure action (`PauseRuntime`).
- **`UICommand`/`UICommandBinder`** (Command) — add commands, bind to new AppServices.
- **`ISaveJsonAdapter`** (Save) — swap JSON engine; extend `SimulationModelSaveData` for twin persistence.
- **`IAssetLoader`/`AssetService`** (Resource) — plug UGF/Addressables/Resources loaders.
- **`IDataProcessor`** (Network) — add protocol processors writing DCs + firing events.
- **`DataCenterBase`** (Data) — add DCs for twin telemetry as single sources of truth.
- **`PresenterBase`/`UIFormBase`** (UI) — add presenters/forms bound to new ViewData.
- **`AegisFlowContext.Build()`** — the single wiring point to register all new services.
- **Legacy adapters** — migrate existing twin code incrementally without rewriting.

## Compile Boundaries (noEngineReferences note)
`Data`, `Event`, `Domain`, `Save`, `Application` have `noEngineReferences: true` (pure C#, testable without Unity). `Runtime`, `Factory`, `Procedure`, `UI`, `Resource`, `Legacy`, `Network`, `Bootstrap` reference UnityEngine (Bootstrap also needs `UnityGameFramework.Runtime`). This lets core logic run in EditMode/unit tests.

Next steps:
To build a digital twin: (1) extend `EntityData` with twin fields + new ConfigIds; (2) implement `IRuntimeEventStrategy` for each asset type and register via `RuntimeEventStrategyConfig` (JSON-driven) or code in `AegisFlowContext.Build`; (3) add `ISimulationEventHandler`s for new event types and register on `SimulationEventProcessor`; (4) add `UICommand`s + bind in `UICommandBinder` for twin operations; (5) optionally add a `TwinDC : DataCenterBase` for live telemetry. All wiring happens in `AegisFlowContext.Build()` / `ProcedureDependencies`. The remaining unread files (due to a read-cache glitch: `EntityData.cs`, `RuntimeDC.cs`, `SimulationStepScheduler.cs`, `SimulationEventQueue.cs`, `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.cs`, `UIFormBase.cs`, `PresenterBase.cs`, `EntityFactory.cs`) are fully described in `ARCHITECTURE.md` and inferred from their callers above — re-read them directly if exact line-level APIs are needed before implementation.

# AegisFlow 架构设计图

本文档以当前代码和 `asmdef` 为准，描述模块边界、启动流程、业务命令、存档和仿真运行链路。

## 1. 模块分层与依赖

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    bootstrap["Bootstrap：组合根与 Unity 生命周期"]
    procedure["Procedure：流程状态与路由"]
    ui["UI：Form / Presenter / Toast"]
    command["Command：UI 命令分发与绑定"]
    application["Application：用例编排与快照构建"]
    domain["Domain：业务规则与领域服务"]
    runtime["Runtime：事件队列 / 调度 / 恢复"]
    network["Network：请求与数据处理器"]
    save["Save：版本化 JSON / 原子存档 / 备份"]
    resource["Resource：资源加载适配器"]
    legacy["Legacy：旧系统迁移适配器"]
    factory["Factory：实体创建与组件绑定"]
    data["Data：DC / Repository / Snapshot"]
    eventBus["Event：领域事件与状态通知"]

    bootstrap --> procedure
    bootstrap --> ui
    bootstrap --> command
    bootstrap --> application
    bootstrap --> domain
    bootstrap --> runtime
    bootstrap --> network
    bootstrap --> save
    bootstrap --> resource
    bootstrap --> legacy

    procedure --> application
    procedure --> domain
    procedure --> runtime
    procedure --> data
    procedure --> eventBus

    ui --> domain
    ui --> data
    ui --> eventBus
    command --> application
    command --> domain
    command --> data
    command --> eventBus

    application --> domain
    application --> runtime
    application --> save
    application --> data
    domain --> data
    runtime --> data
    runtime --> eventBus
    network --> data
    network --> eventBus
    save --> data
    legacy --> data
    legacy --> save
    factory --> data
```

边界规则：

- `Bootstrap` 是唯一组合根，可以依赖全部业务模块。
- `Procedure` 只能接收 `ProcedureDependencies`，不得反向引用 `Bootstrap/AegisFlowContext`。
- `UI` 只展示 ViewData、发送 Command 或订阅 Event，不直接修改 Repository。
- `Runtime` 只读取 `RuntimeSnapshot`，不直接读取编辑态 Repository。
- `Data` 与 `Event` 是底层叶子程序集，不依赖上层模块。

## 2. 启动与流程状态

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    unity["Unity GameEntry"] -->|"Awake / Start"| appBootstrap["AppBootstrap.Initialize"]
    appBootstrap --> infrastructure["初始化 AssetService 与 SaveAppService"]
    appBootstrap --> context["AegisFlowContext.Build"]
    context --> services["创建 DC、Repository、Domain、Application、Runtime"]
    context --> binders["注册 Network Processor、Event Handler、UI Command"]
    appBootstrap --> dependencies["创建 ProcedureDependencies"]
    dependencies --> launch["ProcedureLaunch"]
    launch --> preload["ProcedurePreload"]
    preload --> hub["ProcedureHub"]
    hub -->|"选择模型"| editor["ProcedureSimulationEditor"]
    editor -->|"保存并运行"| runtimeState["ProcedureSimulationRuntime"]
    editor -->|"返回"| hub
    runtimeState -->|"停止"| hub
```

## 3. 编辑、命令与存档流程

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor User as 用户
    participant View as UI Form
    participant Dispatcher as UICommandDispatcher
    participant Binder as UICommandBinder
    participant Domain as EntityDomainService
    participant App as SimulationModelAppService
    participant Repo as Repository / DC
    participant Save as SaveAppService
    participant Bus as DomainEventBus
    participant Presenter as Presenter / Toast

    User->>View: 创建实体
    View->>Dispatcher: CreateEntityCommand
    Dispatcher->>Binder: 分发命令
    Binder->>Domain: CreateEntity
    Domain->>Repo: 写入实体
    Binder->>Bus: UICommandExecutedEvent
    Bus->>Presenter: 刷新状态与提示

    User->>View: 保存模型
    View->>Dispatcher: SaveModelCommand
    Dispatcher->>Binder: 分发命令
    Binder->>App: SaveCurrentModel
    App->>Repo: 读取模型与实体
    App->>Save: 版本化 JSON 原子保存
    Save-->>App: 主存档与备份结果
    App-->>Binder: 保存结果
    Binder->>Bus: UICommandExecutedEvent
```

## 4. 仿真运行与故障恢复

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    editorRepo["编辑态 EntityRepository"] --> snapshotService["RuntimeSnapshotService"]
    snapshotService --> snapshot["只读 RuntimeSnapshot"]
    snapshot --> runtimeController["SimulationRuntimeController.Load"]
    runtimeController --> queueBuilder["RuntimeEventQueueBuilder"]
    queueBuilder --> eventQueue["SimulationEventQueue"]
    runtimeController --> scheduler["SimulationStepScheduler"]
    scheduler --> eventQueue
    scheduler --> processor["SimulationEventProcessor"]
    processor --> handlers["Create / Activate / Complete Handler"]
    processor --> result["SimulationEventExecutionResult"]
    result --> eventBus["DomainEventBus"]
    eventBus --> runtimePresenter["RuntimePresenter / Status Form"]
    result -->|"PauseRuntime"| paused["暂停并保留失败上下文"]
    paused -->|"Retry"| processor
    paused -->|"Skip"| scheduler
    paused -->|"Terminate"| stopped["清理队列并停止 Runtime"]
```

运行时不变量：

- 固定步长由 `SimulationStepScheduler` 控制，并限制单帧追赶步数。
- Handler 异常必须转为结构化失败，不能逃逸到 Unity 主循环。
- 暂停恢复支持 Retry、Skip、Terminate，且不得重复推进当前 Step。
- Runtime 停止后必须清理 Snapshot、Queue、失败上下文和 `RuntimeDC`。

## 5. 全面测试覆盖地图

| 测试层级 | 覆盖模块 | 关键断言 |
|---|---|---|
| 架构规则 | asmdef、Bootstrap、Procedure、UI | 无循环依赖；Procedure 不引用 Bootstrap；UI 不写 Repository |
| 单元测试 | Data、Domain、Event、Save、Runtime、UI | 边界值、重复数据、事件解绑、JSON 版本、调度重入、Toast 生命周期 |
| 应用测试 | Application、Command、Network、Legacy、Factory | 用例编排、命令结果、协议注册、迁移幂等、实体恢复 |
| 集成测试 | Bootstrap、Procedure、Save、Runtime | 启动到 Hub；创建到保存再加载；快照到运行；失败恢复 |
| PlayMode 冒烟 | GameEntry、UI Form、Unity 生命周期 | 场景启动、点击命令、状态刷新、退出清理均无异常 |

推荐的最小端到端验收链：

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    start["启动 GameEntry"] --> hub["进入 Hub"]
    hub --> login["注入登录与玩家数据"]
    login --> editor["进入 Editor"]
    editor --> create["创建实体"]
    create --> save["保存模型"]
    save --> reload["清空并重新加载"]
    reload --> run["生成快照并启动 Runtime"]
    run --> steps["执行 Creating / Active / Complete"]
    steps --> verify["验证事件、状态和 Presenter"]
    verify --> stop["停止并校验资源清理"]
```

# AegisFlowCode 玄盾流架构代码骨架

> 这是一套可迁入 Unity 项目的玄盾流架构 C# 代码骨架。  
> 目标不是替换旧项目，而是为新功能建立清晰边界。

---

## 1. 代码骨架范围

```text
AegisFlowCode
├── Bootstrap       启动入口
├── Procedure       流程岗位
├── Application     用例编排
├── Domain          领域防腐
├── Data            DC / Repository 数据容器
├── Event           强类型领域事件
├── Command         UI / 领域命令
├── Network         协议处理器注册表
├── Factory         实体创建、分组、组件绑定
├── UI              UIForm / Presenter 基类
├── Runtime         运行态 Snapshot / Scheduler
├── Resource        资源统一入口
├── Save            保存统一入口
└── Legacy          旧系统防腐适配器
```

---

## 2. 推荐接入顺序

### 第一步：接入 Bootstrap

将以下文件迁入 Unity：

```text
Bootstrap/GameEntry.cs
Bootstrap/AppBootstrap.cs
Procedure/ProcedureBase.cs
Procedure/ProcedureController.cs
Procedure/ProcedureLaunch.cs
Procedure/ProcedurePreload.cs
Procedure/ProcedureHub.cs
```

在启动场景中创建一个 GameObject，挂载 `AegisFlow.Bootstrap.GameEntry`。

---

### 第二步：接入资源入口

迁入：

```text
Resource/IAssetLoader.cs
Resource/AssetService.cs
Resource/ResourcesLegacyAdapter.cs
```

旧项目仍可先走 `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`，后续再替换为 UGF Resource / Addressables Adapter。

---

### 第三步：接入数据与领域层

迁入：

```text
Data/EntityData.cs
Data/EntityRepository.cs
Data/ModelRepository.cs
Domain/EntityDomainService.cs
Domain/ModelDomainService.cs
Application/RuntimeSnapshotService.cs
```

注意：

```text
Repository 只做数据容器。
业务规则写在 DomainService。
UI 不允许直接写 Repository。
```

---

### 第四步：接入 UI 基类

迁入：

```text
UI/UIFormBase.cs
UI/PresenterBase.cs
```

新 UI 必须遵守：

```text
UI 只展示 ViewData。
UI 只发 Command。
UI 不直接写 DC / Repository / PlayerState。
```

---

### 第五步：接入运行态快照

迁入：

```text
Data/RuntimeSnapshot.cs
Runtime/SimulationRuntimeController.cs
Runtime/SimulationStepScheduler.cs
Application/SimulationAppService.cs
```

运行态必须遵守：

```text
运行态不直接读编辑态 Repository。
运行态使用 RuntimeSnapshot。
StepScheduler 禁止 async void 重入。
```

---

### 第六步：接入保存系统

迁入：

```text
Save/ISaveRepository.cs
Save/SaveAppService.cs
Save/LocalSaveRepository.cs
```

真实项目中建议替换为已有高质量实现：

```text
DataSaver.SaveDataToJsonSafe
```

---

### 第七步：接入旧系统防腐层

迁入：

```text
Legacy/LegacyGameAdapter.cs
```

后续按需扩展：

```text
LegacyPlayerStateAdapter
LegacyMrCSaveAdapter
LegacyEntityRepositoryAdapter
LegacyResourceAdapter
```

---

## 3. 当前骨架重点解决的问题

| 问题 | 对应代码 |
|---|---|
| GameEntry MonoBehaviour new 风险 | Bootstrap/GameEntry.cs |
| Procedure 职责膨胀 | Procedure/ProcedureBase.cs |

args.result:
## Overview

AegisFlowCode (玄盾流 / "Xuan-Wu") is a layered Unity C# architecture skeleton at `E:\Unity\unity-Project\xuan-wu\Assets\AegisFlowCode`. It is organized into 15 asmdef-bounded modules. The design enforces strict layering: `Data` and `Event` are leaf assemblies (no engine refs, no upstream deps); `Bootstrap` is the only composition root allowed to reference everything. The codebase is a simulation/digital-twin platform — it edits "models" (collections of entities), snapshots them into an immutable runtime, then drives a fixed-step event queue with structured failure/recovery (Retry/Skip/Terminate).

I read the full `ARCHITECTURE.md` and `README.md` (which enumerate every file added across 19 batches), all 15 `.asmdef` files, and directly read source from Bootstrap, Application, Domain, Data, Runtime, Event, Command, and Save. (A few files returned a caching "unchanged" glitch, but their behavior is fully described in the architecture docs and inferred from their callers.)

## Module Dependency Graph (from .asmdef references)

```
Data        → (none)                          [leaf, noEngineReferences]
Event       → (none)                          [leaf]
Domain      → Data
Runtime     → Data, Event
Save        → Data
Factory     → Data
Network     → Data, Event
Application → Data, Domain, Runtime, Save
Command     → Application, Domain, Data, Event
UI          → Domain, Data, Event
Procedure   → Application, Data, Domain, Event, Runtime
Legacy      → Data, Save
Resource    → (none, plain Unity/UGF)
Bootstrap   → ALL of the above + UnityGameFramework.Runtime
Tests       → (architecture rules + behavior tests)
```
Key rule: `Procedure` may NOT reference `Bootstrap` (enforced via `ProcedureDependencies` injection). `UI` may NOT write repositories/DCs. `Runtime` reads only `RuntimeSnapshot`, never edit-state repositories.

## Folder-by-Folder Summary

### Bootstrap/ (composition root + Unity lifecycle)
- **`GameEntry.cs`** — `sealed MonoBehaviour`, singleton with `DontDestroyOnLoad`. `Awake` sets instance; `Start` creates `AppBootstrap`; forwards `Update`/`OnDestroy`. Pure Unity entry, no business logic.
- **`AppBootstrap.cs`** — `Initialize()`: inits `AssetService` (picks `UGFResourceAdapter` if ResourceComponent present, else `ResourcesLegacyAdapter`), inits `SaveAppService` with `LocalSaveRepository`, builds `AegisFlowContext`, creates `ProcedureDependencies`, and launches `ProcedureLaunch` via `ProcedureController.ChangeProcedure`. Has `Update(elapse, realElapse)` (drives procedure tick) and `Shutdown()` (disposes context + Save/Asset services).
- **`AegisFlowContext.cs`** — the pure composition root. Holds public getters for ALL services. `Build()` instantiates and wires: 4 DCs, 2 repositories, `DomainEventBus`, 4 DomainServices, `RuntimeSnapshotService`, strategy config + `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder` (registers `ConfigRuntimeEventStrategy`), Network (`DataProcessorRegistry` + `Login/PlayerDataProcessor` + `NetworkClient` + `LoginReqService`), Runtime (`SimulationEventProcessor` with Create/Activate/Complete handlers, `SimulationEventQueue`, `SimulationRuntimeController`), `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService` (with `UnitySaveJsonAdapter`), UI command (`UICommandDispatcher`+`UICommandBinder.Bind()`), Toast (`ToastPresenter`/`ToastPolicy`/`ToastQueue`/`UIFormLifecycleBinder`), 2 Presenters, and 5 Legacy adapters. `Dispose()` unbinds/clears everything.

### Procedure/ (workflow state machine)
- **`ProcedureBase.cs`** — abstract base for procedure states (constructor takes controller + dependencies).
- **`ProcedureController.cs`** — manages current procedure; `ChangeProcedure(...)`, `Update(...)`, `Shutdown()`.
- **`ProcedureDependencies.cs`** — value object injected into procedures (carries `SimulationDC`, `PlayerDomainService`, `ModelDomainService`, `SimulationAppService`, `SimulationModelAppService`, `SimulationRuntimeController`, `DomainEventBus`). This replaces a reverse-dependency on AegisFlowContext.
- **`ProcedureRouteService.cs`** — routing with guards: empty modelId guard, `HasPlayer` permission guard, `SimulationDC.IsDirty` dirty-data guard; fires `ProcedureRouteFailedEvent` on failure.
- **`ProcedureLaunch` → `ProcedurePreload` → `ProcedureHub` → `ProcedureSimulationEditor` → `ProcedureSimulationRuntime`** — the flow. Editor supports `SaveCurrentModel`/load via `SimulationModelAppService`, `BackToHub`/`EnterRuntime` via `ProcedureRouteService`. Runtime stops the runtime on exit.

### Application/ (use-case orchestration)
- **`SimulationAppService`** — `StartRuntime(modelId)` (checks `ModelDomainService.CanRun`, builds snapshot via `RuntimeSnapshotService`, loads into `SimulationRuntimeController`); `RetryFailedEvent()`/`SkipFailedEvent()`/`TerminateFailedRuntime()` for recovery.
- **`SimulationModelAppService`** — edit-state save/load. `SaveCurrentModel()` writes `SimulationModelSaveData(modelId, false, EntityRepository.GetAll())` via `SaveAppService.Save` (key `simulation_{modelId}`), marks `SimulationDC.MarkSaved`, registers in `ModelRepository`. `LoadModel(modelId)` tries main save then backup, validates modelId match, clears + repopulates `EntityRepository`, `SimulationDC.SwitchModel`.
- **`RuntimeSnapshotService`** — `BuildSnapshot(modelId)`: deep-clones each `EntityData` from `EntityRepository` into a `RuntimeSnapshot` (immutable runtime view).

### Domain/ (business rules, anti-corruption)
- **`EntityDomainService`** — `CreateEntity(EntityData)` (null/id/duplicate guards → `EntityRepository.Add`), `RemoveEntity(entityId)`.
- **`ModelDomainService`** — `CanRun(modelId)` (existence check), `Register(modelId)`.
- **`PlayerDomainService`** — `HasPlayer()`, `CanEnterBattle()` (has player + Level>0).
- **`BattlePrepareDomainService`** — `TryBuildBattleInput(out BattleInput)` (gate on CanEnterBattle).
- **`BattleInput.cs`** — battle input DTO.

### Data/ (single source of truth — DCs, repositories, snapshot)
- **`DataCenterBase`** (abstract) — DC base with `AddChangedListener`/`RemoveChangedListener`/protected `Save()` (observer notification). DCs = single source of truth, UI reads only.
- **`AccountDC`** — `AccountId`, `Token`, `IsLoggedIn`, `AttachLoginResult(...)`, `Clear()`.
- **`PlayerDC`** — `PlayerId`, `DisplayName`, `Level`, `AttachPlayerInfo(...)`.
- **`SimulationDC`** — `CurrentModelId`, `IsDirty`, `SwitchModel/MarkDirty/MarkSaved`.
- **`RuntimeDC`** — runtime state (modelId/step/status); `StartRuntime`/`Stop` (referenced by controller).
- **`EntityRepository`** — pure container, no rules: `Exists/Add/Remove/Get/GetAll/Clear` over `Dictionary<string,EntityData>`.
- **`ModelRepository`** — `HashSet<string>` of model IDs: `Exists/Add/Remove`.
- **`EntityData`** — core entity model with `EntityId`, `ConfigId`, and `Clone()` (deep-clone for snapshot isolation). **This is the central data unit for a digital twin.**
- **`RuntimeSnapshot`** — immutable `ModelId` + `IReadOnlyList<EntityData>`; `AddEntity`.

### Runtime/ (event queue, scheduling, recovery)
- **`SimulationRuntimeController`** — `Load(snapshot)` (resets scheduler, builds queue via `RuntimeEventQueueBuilder.Build`, `RuntimeDC.StartRuntime`), `Tick(deltaTime)` → scheduler, `RetryFailedEvent/SkipFailedEvent/TerminateFailedRuntime/Stop`. `HasPendingFailure` exposes scheduler state.
- **`SimulationStepScheduler`** — fixed-step, single-frame catch-up cap, no `async void` reentry; on failure pauses and preserves failed event + remaining-events context; fires `RuntimeStepChangedEvent`.
- **`SimulationEventProcessor`** — registry of `ISimulationEventHandler` by `EventType`; `ExecuteEvent` applies `SimulationEventExecutionPolicy` (max retries), catches handler exceptions into structured `SimulationEventExecutionResult` (status, attemptCount, durationMs via Stopwatch, errorMessage).
- **`SimulationEventQueue`** — time_step ordered event queue.
- **`SimulationEvent`** — `EventType`, `TimeStep`, `EntityId`.
- **`ISimulationEventHandler`** — `{ string EventType; bool Execute(SimulationEvent); }`.
